summary: ANDROID 🤖 Falcon Charge Stand displays on User Guides screen but it shouldn't
scenario: Falcon Charge Stand incorrectly appears as a sub-device on the User Guides screen where no sub-devices should be displayed.
description_clean: On the User Guides screen, the Falcon Charge Stand is displayed as a sub-device, but it should not appear. The user should see no sub-devices on that screen.
steps: Navigate to the User Guides screen.
Observe the list of devices displayed on the screen.
expected: No sub-devices should appear on the User Guides screen.
actual: The Falcon Charge Stand is displayed as a sub-device on the User Guides screen.
